title: Fix passing filters to networks prune

comments.body: The build seems to be failing because of the [bump to fixtures 4.1.0](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/commit/3e3246896e50d8fe7b7659d4f353f6bec718dfa9) which [dropped support for Python 3.6](https://github.com/testing-cabal/fixtures/blob/master/NEWS).
Can you rebase off of current main branch, should fix the fixtures issue.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *francisbergin*, *umohnani8* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman-py). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [umohnani8] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
